description_long: This is a young adult male dressed in urban streetwear, featuring a hooded jacket with a large 'R' on the chest and a plush bear accessory attached to the front. He wears knee-length shorts, high-top sneakers, and sports a crossbody bag with visible straps and orange accents. His look is accessorized with round glasses, a necklace, and a chain hanging from his shorts. The character has a modern, voluminous hairstyle and a confident, relaxed stance. The overall appearance is stylish and contemporary, suitable for a city or neighborhood environment. The clothing and accessories suggest a blend of fashion and functionality, with multiple layers and visible details.
description: A stylish young adult male in urban streetwear with a hooded jacket, shorts, high-top sneakers, and a plush bear accessory. He carries a crossbody bag and wears round glasses, exuding a modern, confident vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded jacket with 'R', plush bear accessory, round glasses, necklace, and chain; both hands are visible at his sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the plush bear accessory, crossbody bag strap, and the layered look of the jacket and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket with a large 'R', the full crossbody bag, and the orange straps hanging down.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the plush bear from a different angle, the bag strap, and the layered shorts and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a hooded jacket, knee-length shorts, and layered accessories
